description: Triple Crown accreditation banner for the Management School, displaying a fixed tagline and the three accreditation body logos (AMBA, AACSB, Equis).

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard accreditation banner as seen on Management School pages

notes: All content (text and image URLs) is identical across all 846 pages — no props needed. The component is entirely hardcoded. The .aacsb class on the second logo div is always present. Image paths reference the Drupal theme: /themes/custom/uos_public/images/mgmt/. Since this is a pure static display component with no variable content, props array is empty.
